content.text: Debug and resolve a workflow logic error in the HMS Wizard application: The wizard fails to transition to the "Multi-branch" stage after the "Hospital Identity" step is completed. Implement an automatic progression mechanism that triggers the next step immediately upon successful completion of the current step. Additionally, implement a breadcrumb navigation bar at the top of the interface that displays all steps in the wizard, allowing users to track progress and navigate back to previous steps easily.
Your current version of Antigravity is out of date. Please visit https://antigravity.google/download to download and install the latest version.
